description: Add timeout parameter to documented connect() function
input:
diff --git a/src/main.py b/src/main.py
--- a/src/main.py
+++ b/src/main.py
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
-def connect(host: str, port: int) -> bool:
+def connect(host: str, port: int, timeout: int = 30) -> bool:

baseline_expected.behavior: Detects param change, updates docstring, may rewrite entire README section including unfenced prose
problems: Overwrites human-authored content outside fence markers

skill_expected.behavior: Detects [PARAM], updates docstring, updates ONLY fenced README row, leaves unfenced prose untouched

skill_wins_because: Fence boundary respect — skill only edits machine-owned sections
